confirm-change-forms-status_other: Are you sure you want to change the status of {{count}} forms?
installation-guide-description: Follow the steps below to embed this form on your website.
install-step-1-title: Add the loader script to your HTML
install-step-1-description: Paste this snippet just before the closing </body> tag. It loads the form widget asynchronously without blocking your page.
install-step-2-title: Place the embed element where the form should appear
install-step-2-description: Add this element anywhere in your page body. The form will render inside it.
install-step-2-popup-note: If your form style is a popup, additionally paste this code after the main code.
checklist-embed-element: Embed element is placed where you want the form to appear
checklist-same-page: Both snippets are on the same page
checklist-https: Page is served over HTTPS (required for the widget)
share-link-description: Share link below to gather form submissions
channel-id-required: Channel ID is required to create a form
error-message-placeholder: Error message shown to the user
select-conversation-to-view: Please select a conversation to view its details.
subject: Subject
integration-name-description: Give your integration a name to identify it
unable-to-open-authorization-window: Unable to open the authorization window
authorization-cancelled: Authorization was cancelled or Facebook returned an error. Please try again.
please-allow-popups: Please allow pop-ups for this site and try again.
confirm-update-facebook-configs: Are you sure you want to update the Facebook configs?
fb-messenger-setup-description: Configure your Facebook Messenger integration to connect with your Facebook pages and manage conversations.
fb-select-pages-description: Select the pages where you want to integrate its pages with.
fb-24h-window-title: Your last interaction with this contact was more than 24 hours ago.
fb-24h-window-description: Only Tagged Messages are allowed outside the standard messaging window
confirm-update-instagram-configs: Are you sure you want to update the Instagram configs?
ig-select-pages-description: Select the Instagram pages you want to integrate.
ig-select-accounts-description: Select the accounts where you want to integrate its pages with.
installation-script-description: Copy and paste this script into your website's HTML, just before the closing tag.
installation-step-2: Paste it into your website's HTML
installation-step-3: Place it just before the closing </body> tag
installation-step-4: The messenger widget will appear on your site
choose-the-brand-for-this-integration: Choose the brand for this integration
choose-brand-description: Choose the brand for this integration
display-operator-timezone-description: Display chat operator timezone set in their location in team member profiles
hide-messenger-during-offline-hours-desc: Forcibly hide the messenger when you're offline. This will hide the messenger from your website visitors.
visible-online-to-visitor-or-customer: Visible online to visitor or customer
logo-description: Shown in the messenger header. PNG/SVG, 1:1.
launcher-logo-description: The floating button icon. Square works best.
persistent-menu-tooltip: A Persistent Menu is a quick-access toolbar in your chat.
require-authentication-description: It will require email and phone in widget
show-chat-description: Hide chat section and show only knowledgebase and form
show-launcher-description: The widget section will invisible but you can still get messenger data
force-logout-description: If an operator resolve the conversation from inbox then client session will end automatically
notify-customer-description: If customer is offline and inserted email, it will send email when operator respond
enable-ai-bot-description: Enable AI bot to handle conversations
automation-bot-description: Select the automation that handles messenger bot
ai-agent-and-team-can-help: AI Agent and team can help
contact-us-for-questions: Contact us for any questions or concerns.
thank-you-for-contacting-us: Thank you for contacting us. We will get back to you as soon as possible.
received-your-message: We've received your message and will contact you shortly.
something-went-wrong-creating-session: Uh oh! Something went wrong while creating session
something-went-wrong-pausing-agent: Uh oh! Something went wrong while pausing agent
enter-email-or-phone: Enter your email or phone number
engage-customers-description: Engage customers, respond quickly, improve satisfaction
integration-desc-erxes-messenger: Connect with your website visitors using the erxes Messenger widget.
integration-desc-facebook-messenger: Connect with your customers through Facebook Messenger.
integration-desc-facebook-post: Manage comments and replies on your Facebook posts.
integration-desc-instagram-messenger: Connect with your customers through Instagram Direct Messages.
integration-desc-instagram-post: Manage comments and replies on your Instagram posts.
integration-desc-call: Handle inbound and outbound calls using the Grandstream call integration.
integration-desc-imap: Connect your email account via IMAP to manage email conversations.
something-went-wrong-getting-configs: Uh oh! Something went wrong while getting configs
something-went-wrong-getting-user-integr: Uh oh! Something went wrong while getting user integrations
something-went-wrong-getting-integration: Uh oh! Something went wrong while getting integration detail
select-knowledge-base-topic-description: Select a Knowledge Base topic in your config to display articles here.
kb-confirm-delete-category: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"? This will also delete all associated articles. This action cannot be undone.
kb-confirm-delete-topic: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"? This will also delete all associated categories and articles. This action cannot be undone.
kb-confirm-delete-topic-with-count: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"? This will also delete {{count}} categories and all their associated articles. This action cannot be undone.
kb-action-permanent: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
kb-failed-delete-category: Failed to delete category. Please try again.
kb-embed-description: Embed this knowledge base topic into your website using the script below.
kb-embed-script-description: Copy and paste this script into your website's HTML to embed this knowledge base topic.
kb-install-step-4: The knowledge base topic widget will appear on your site
kb-confirm-delete-articles_one: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} article? This action cannot be undone.
kb-confirm-delete-articles_other: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} articles? This action cannot be undone.
kb-adjust-search: Try adjusting your search terms or filters.
kb-create-first-article: Create your first article to get started with this category.
kb-no-categories-description: This topic doesn't have any categories yet. Create your first category to start organizing articles.
kb-no-topics-description: Create your first topic and start your knowledge base.
no-pipelines-description: Get started by creating your first pipeline to organize and manage your workflow processes.
attribution-no-leading-space: Please make sure the attribution doesn't start with a space
control-ticket-visibility: Control ticket visibility inside this pipeline
visibility-rule-day-after-created-desc: Only show tickets created after the previous day
visibility-rule-branch-only-desc: Show only tickets from user's branch
visibility-rule-my-tickets-only-desc: Show only tickets assigned to the user
visibility-rule-department-only-desc: Show only tickets from user's department
pipeline-permissions-description: Configure who can view and manage tickets
select-ticket-basic-fields-description: Select the fields from the ticket to show in the pipeline form
edit-fields-description: Design the fields to show in the pipeline form. Drag to reorder.
no-call-integration-found: No call integration found for this user.
no-queues-assigned: The selected integration has no assigned queues.
no-volume-data: No volume data for selected range
no-agent-data: No agent data for the selected range
no-queue-data: No queue data for the selected range
no-top-number-data: No top-number data for the selected period
no-callback-data: No callback data for the selected period
confirm-delete-responses: Are you sure you want to delete the {{count}} selected response(s)?
confirm-delete-response: Are you sure you want to delete this response?
get-started-creating-first-response: Get started by creating your first response
add-ticket-description: Add a new ticket to your organization.
confirm-delete-ticket: Are you sure you want to delete this ticket?
confirm-delete-selected-tickets: Are you sure you want to delete the {{count}} selected Ticket?
create-pipeline-description: Create a pipeline to start organizing your board.
inbox-message-trigger-description: This trigger fires whenever a customer sends a message in the messenger widget. Make sure the integration has bot mode enabled.
facebook-authorized: Facebook authorized, You can close this window
integrations-subtitle: Set up your integrations and start connecting with your customers
drag-drop-or-upload: Drag and Drop, choose from your Media library or upload
form-error: There is some error in the form
persistent-menu-description: Configure menu items that appear in your bot
enable-back-button: Enable Back Button on Persistence menu
select-page-to-link-bot: Select a page to link your bot to.
check-comment-text-keywords: Check comment text contains with keywords
no-conditions-description: When no conditions are added, this trigger will run for any incoming direct text message.
no-conditions-hint: Leave this empty to trigger on any direct text message, or add conditions to match specific keywords.
file-size-must-be-less-than: File size must be less than {{limit}}MB
no-persistent-menus: No persistent menus in selected bot
persistent-menu-link-note: Persistent menu with link can't display as selectable condition on section
notification-no-detail-view: This notification does not have a linked detail view yet.
action-requires-trigger: This action must be part of a chain that starts with a trigger
max-five-messages: You can only add up to 5 messages per action
trigger-on-any-open-thread: Trigger on any open thread entry point
match-only-selected-sources: Match only selected ad or post source ids
audio-not-supported: Your browser does not support the audio element.
call-volume-by-hour-and-day: Call volume by hour and day of week
per-queue-answer-rate: Per-queue answer rate, wait and talk times
highest-volume-phone-numbers: Highest-volume phone numbers in the selected period
show-initial-message-description: When enabled, the bot will display the greeting message as an initial message in the conversation.
fill-in-ticket-details: Please fill in the ticket details:
